claude.market_summary: Oil shock above $100 crushes broad market while energy and momentum names outperform amid Iran war escalation.

winners.reason: Oil surging on Iran war escalation
Refining margins expand on supply fears
Defense demand surges on Iran war

losers.reason: War disrupts routes, oil costs soar
